items.title: Ajax-target Oleksandr Zinchenko is een middenvelder op linksachter
items.summary: Ajax is in de zoektocht naar versterking uitgekomen bij Oleksandr Zinchenko (29). Met de Oekraïner mikken de Amsterdammers op een vleugelverdediger met een zeer specifiek profiel. Zinchenko blinkt alleen uit als back aan de binnenkant.

items.title: Ajax vindt oplossing met Arsenal over Zinchenko
items.summary: Ajax heeft Oleksandr Zinchenko bijna binnen. De 29-jarige Oekraïner maakt de definitieve overstap van Arsenal naar Amsterdam, waar hij een kort contract gaat tekenen.

items.title: Arsenal’s Ethan Nwaneri poised for Marseille loan in blow to English suitors
items.summary: Crystal Palace and West Ham also keen on midfielder Oleksandr Zinchenko close to permanent Ajax move Ethan Nwaneri is poised to join Marseille on loan until the end of the season, with Arsenal keen to allow the England Under-21 midfielder to depart given he has barely featured this season. Nwaneri has played 165 minutes in the Premier League, having excelled in his breakthrough campaign, when he scored nine goals in all competitions. He has not appeared in the league since the end of November, when he came on in the north London derby. Continue reading...

items.title: Monaco's Balogun: Playing Real Madrid 'a dream'
items.summary: United States men's national team and Monaco striker Folarin Balogun told ESPN he will achieve one of his dreams on Tuesday when the Ligue 1 club face Real Madrid at the Bernabéu in the Champions League.

items.title: Source: Sporting KC majority stake sold at $700M
items.summary: A minority owner in MLS side Sporting Kansas City has completed a deal to purchase a majority stake in the club from its current owners, a source confirmed to ESPN.

items.title: PSG boss, Sergio Ramos defend Díaz AFCON pen
items.summary: Luis Enrique has said Brahim Diaz is "neither an assassin nor a bad person" after his failure to convert a penalty in Morocco's AFCON final defeat.

items.title: Sources: Marseille chase Arsenal teen Nwaneri
items.summary: Marseille are one of several clubs exploring a loan move for Arsenal midfielder Ethan Nwaneri, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: Bamford: 'When you're not playing football, life feels out of sync'
items.summary: "When you’re not playing football, life feels a bit out of sync."

items.title: Sparta breidt Noorse enclave uit met jonge middenvelder
items.summary: Sparta Rotterdam voegt na Tobias Lauritsen en Joshua Kitolano een derde Noor toe aan de selectie. Alwande Roaldsøy komt per direct over van Molde FK. Hij tekent tot medio 2030 op Het Kasteel.

items.title: Feyenoord krijgt te maken met arbiter van memorabele avond in Lissabon
items.summary: De UEFA heeft Umut Meler aangesteld als arbiter van de Europa League-wedstrijd tussen Feyenoord en Sturm Graz van donderdagavond. De Rotterdammers koesteren goede herinneringen aan de 39-jarige Turk.

items.title: USMNT 2026 World Cup Big Board 4.0: Pochettino's roster coming into focus
items.summary: We're less than five months away from the USMNT's World Cup opener, and with the clock ticking down, Mauricio Pochettino's squad is coming into focus.

items.title: Wintertransfers Eredivisie seizoen 2025/26: alle clubs op een rij
items.summary: De transferperiode is weer losgebarsten. In dit overzicht van VI vind je alle afgeronde, door clubs bevestigde, wintertransfers van de achttien Eredivisie-clubs. Clubs in Nederland kunnen tot en met 2 februari spelers aantrekken .

items.title: 'This is unheard of!' Did the Bills fire the wrong man?
items.summary: The craziness of the NFL coaching cycle continued this week with the Buffalo Bills firing head coach Sean McDermott after nine years at the helm. I must admit I was totally surprised by this one.

items.title: Jamaica bobsleigh team qualifies for Winter Olympics with former British athlete
items.summary: The Jamaican bobsleigh team have qualified three sleds for the 2026 Winter Olympics in Milano Cortina, Italy, to continue the country's legacy in the sport that helped inspire a Disney movie.

items.title: Joshua's driver in fatal car crash has trial adjourned
items.summary: The trial of the driver involved in the fatal accident that injured Anthony Joshua and killed two of his team has been adjourned until next month.

items.title: Huddersfield appoint Manning as head coach
items.summary: League One Huddersfield Town appoint former Norwich and Bristol City boss Liam Manning as head coach.

items.title: Why Iraola's Bournemouth future is uncertain
items.summary: With his contract expiring in the summer, Andoni Iraola's future at Bournemouth is unclear after two successful seasons in charge.

items.title: Gray returns for Scotland as Townsend names Six Nations squad
items.summary: Scotland head coach Gregor Townsend has recalled second row Jonny Gray and hooker Dave Cherry into his 40-man squad for the 2026 Six Nations.

items.title: Trinity Rodman and the HIP rule: USWNT stars going abroad may not be the worst thing
items.summary: The benefit of national team players honing skills abroad is balanced by concerns over a weakened NWSL The dust has yet to settle on Trinity Rodman’s club status, but the star USA forward’s near future has ignited an emphatic revival of an old debate on this side of the Atlantic. How does the National Women’s Soccer League stack up against its top competitor leagues? At what point should the league be worried, if top USWNT talent trickles across the Atlantic? And what, if anything, can be done to stop the flow? Continue reading...

items.title: David Squires on … Frank and the Spurs supertanker getting in a tight spot again
items.summary: Our cartoonist on the latest manager in north London to take the good ship Tottenham in the wrong direction Buy a cartoon | David’s favourite work of 2025 And his latest book, Chaos in the Box: get it now Continue reading...
